title: I Called Upon the Lord in My Distress

verses.text: To you, deceitful tongue, what shall be giv’n? To you, deceitful tongue, what shall be done? A warrior’s sharpened arrows you’ll receive With coals still glowing, burning from the vine.
O woe to me that I in Meshech dwell, That I must sojourn there in Kedar’s tents. Too long I’ve lived with those who peace abhor. I speak for peace, but then for war they stand.
